description: Create a STRIDE Threat Model diagram for an 'IoT Smart Home System' in EdrawMax. The model must include an external entity 'Mobile App', a process/server 'IoT Cloud Platform', and an external entity 'Smart Thermostat', with two-way data flows connecting both the app and the thermostat to the cloud platform. Include a trust boundary enclosing only the 'IoT Cloud Platform'. Annotate the Mobile App connection with 'Spoofing' and the Smart Thermostat connection with 'Tampering'. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/threat_model.eddx and export it to /home/ga/Documents/threat_model.png.
